case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. STEVEN KARAS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
